nodes.title: Welcome to Iron Rail Brewing Co.
nodes.heroSubtitle: Small Batch. Big Flavor. Local Heart.

heroDescription.processed: At Iron Rail Brewing Co., we believe great beer starts with quality ingredients, time-honored techniques, and a relentless passion for flavor. Visit our taproom, take a brewery tour, or grab a growler to go. There's always something new on tap.
heroDescription.summary: At Iron Rail Brewing Co., we believe great beer starts with quality ingredients, time-honored techniques, and a relentless passion for flavor. Visit our taproom, take a brewery tour, or grab a growler

ctaDescription.processed: Our taproom is open seven days a week, featuring rotating taps, pub fare from our scratch kitchen, and a welcoming atmosphere for beer lovers of all kinds. Bring your friends, your family, and your dog.
